message:
feat(analysis): add orphan detection, O(1) cycle lookup, and case-insensitive labels

Enhances the analysis package with several targeted improvements:

## Orphan Detection in Insights

Adds `findOrphans()` function to detect issues with zero outgoing dependencies
(out-degree = 0). These "orphan" nodes represent standalone work items that
don't block anything else, useful for identifying leaf work that can be
completed independently.

The Insights struct now includes an `Orphans` field populated during
GenerateInsights(), sorted alphabetically for deterministic output.

## O(1) Cycle Detection Optimization

Optimizes findOneCycleInSCC() in graph_cycles.go by introducing a `stackPos`
map that tracks each node's position in the DFS stack. Previously, finding
a node's position in the stack required O(n) linear search; now it's O(1)
map lookup.

This improves worst-case cycle detection from O(n²) to O(n) for large
strongly connected components.

## Case-Insensitive Label Matching

Updates hasLabel() in eta.go to perform case-insensitive comparison:
- Empty target strings now return false immediately (guard clause)
- Both label and target are lowercased before comparison

This ensures velocity calculations work correctly regardless of label
casing inconsistencies (e.g., "Feature" vs "feature").

## Test Coverage

Adds comprehensive tests for:
- Orphan detection edge cases
- Graph cycle detection with larger SCCs
- Articulation point computation
- Full stats edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
